dateSelection.repeatedDate: Repeat for one or more discrete configured local days in YYYY-MM-DD format

clearFlags.explicitOptionalValues: Use `--clear-*` flags to explicitly remove optional values.
clearFlags.valueConflict: Do not mix a value flag with the matching clear flag in the same command.

dateSelection.dateOrRange: Repeat `--date` for one or more discrete local dates. Use `--start-date/--end-date` for one inclusive local-date range.

datetime.configuredTimezone: When a datetime omits timezone information, the configured timezone is used before the value is converted to UTC.

recurringScope.deletes: Use `--scope single|all_future|all` for recurring series deletes.
recurringScope.updates: Use `--scope single|all_future|all` for recurring series updates.

relations.repeatTagOrPersonAttach: Repeat the same `--tag-id` or `--person-id` flag to attach multiple tags or people in one command.
